text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 80 

The original source for this variable is the State Medicare Modernization Act (MMA) files that states 
submit to CMS. Those files are considered the “gold standard” for identifying dual eligibles because 
the information in them is used to determine the level of Medicare Part D low-income subsidies. 

^ Back to TOC ^
